# Wiki Admin Tools

Administrative tools for refreshing and ingesting the shared wiki store.

## Toolbox
- `wiki_admin`

## Runtime
- `toolbox.py`

## Tools
- [[tool/external/wiki_admin/refresh_system]]
- [[tool/external/wiki_admin/ingest_files]]

## Shared Boundary
- Wiki admin tools are privileged and should be denied in lower-permission runtimes.
